problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Combining Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
